_metadata.method: Manually extracted from the official RCSD 'Meet the Trustees' page and district news releases. Officer roles, trustee-area numbers, school/area assignments, emails, and term-expiration years are stated verbatim on the source page. Superintendent transition (Baker retiring 2026-06-30; Rubalcaba appointed 2026-01-21, starting 2026-07-01) and the CBO/Deputy Superintendent come from official RCSD news releases and the published board agenda. Headshots mirrored from the RCSD Finalsite CDN to R2 (data.rcsd.info/trustees/).
_metadata.notes: termStartYear is DERIVED as termEndYear - 4: California Education Code §35107 sets governing-board terms at four years. termEndYear is authoritative (stated on source page). Spanish role/assignment labels follow RCSD's colloquial register; school proper names are kept in English in both languages. contractUrl fields are pending canonical public links to the executed employment agreements.
_metadata.refreshProcedure: Re-check the 'Meet the Trustees' page after each November election and the December board reorganization (officer rotation). Run scripts/fetch-leadership-photos.mjs to refresh headshots, then scripts/build-district.mjs.
